description: Multi-turn: patch a file THEN run the tests to verify. Catches the 'claim tests pass without running them' anti-pattern. order_sensitive=true because running tests before editing is the wrong direction.
user_turns: Read src/lib.rs, then in the `hello_world` function change the returned string from 'hi' to 'hello'. Apply the patch. Then run `cargo test --lib hello_world` to verify it passes.
